# CareCalculus

CareCalculus is a free, multilingual (English, French, Arabic) clinical decision support platform. We provide evidence-based medical calculators and clinical scoring tools for ICU doctors, emergency room physicians, nurses, and medical students.

## Key Tools
- Mean Arterial Pressure (MAP) Calculator
- Glasgow Coma Scale (GCS)
- qSOFA Sepsis Score
- CURB-65 Pneumonia Severity Score
- MELD Score for Liver Disease
- Wells Criteria for DVT

## Audience
Healthcare professionals, medical students, and clinicians requiring rapid, accurate, and peer-reviewed mathematical calculations at the point of care.

## Data & Citations
All tools use validated formulas backed by primary medical literature (e.g., JAMA, AHA, Surviving Sepsis Campaign). We do not store PHI (Protected Health Information).
